--// Melon Decompiler v1.2 | Discord: @melon.uwu
--// Resolved: 186 identifiers | 38 functions | 0 strings
--// Renamed: 38 functions | Connected: 12 callbacks | Dead Code Removed: 24 blocks
--// [Renamer: ON] [Decompiler: ON]

local WindUI = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://github.com/Footagesus/WindUI/releases/latest/download/main.lua"))()

WindUI:SetNotificationLower(true)
WindUI:GetTransparency(true)

WindUI:AddTheme({
    Name = "Green-Black Gradient",
    Accent = WindUI:Gradient({
        ["0"] = { Color = Color3.fromHex("#00FF7F"), Transparency = 0 },
        ["100"] = { Color = Color3.fromHex("#000000"), Transparency = 0 }
    }, { Rotation = 0 }),
    Dialog = Color3.fromHex("#161616"),
    Outline = Color3.fromHex("#00C060"),
    Text = Color3.fromHex("#00FF7F"),
    Placeholder = Color3.fromHex("#018141"),
    Background = Color3.fromHex("#101010"),
    Button = Color3.fromHex("#00C060"),
    Icon = Color3.fromHex("#00FF7F")
})

WindUI:SetTheme("Green-Black Gradient")

local Window = WindUI:CreateWindow({
    Title = "Glaco's script",
    Icon = "rbxassetid://104476591826282",
    Author = "99 Nights In The Forest",
    Folder = "Glaco",
    Size = UDim2.fromOffset(580, 460),
    MinSize = Vector2.new(560, 350),
    MaxSize = Vector2.new(850, 560),
    Transparent = true,
    Theme = "Green-Black Gradient",
    Resizable = true,
    SideBarWidth = 200,
    BackgroundImageTransparency = 0.42,
    HideSearchBar = false,
    ScrollBarEnabled = true
})

Window:SetToggleKey(Enum.KeyCode.K)
Window:EditOpenButton({
    Title = "Glaco's script",
    Icon = "rbxassetid://104476591826282",
    CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, 16),
    StrokeThickness = 2,
    Color = ColorSequence.new(Color3.fromHex("00FF7F"), Color3.fromHex("00C060")),
    OnlyMobile = false,
    Enabled = true,
    Draggable = true
})

Window:Section({ Title = "Main" })

local CombatTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Combat", Icon = "sword", Locked = false })
local AutoTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Auto", Icon = "wrench", Locked = false })
local BringTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Bring", Icon = "package", Locked = false })
local ESPTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "ESP", Icon = "eye", Locked = false })

Window:Section({ Title = "Extra" })

local TeleportTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Teleport", Icon = "map-pin", Locked = false })
local PlayerTab = Window:Tab({ Title = "Player", Icon = "user", Locked = false })

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local Debris = game:GetService("Debris")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer

local CAMPFIRE_POSITION = Vector3.new(0, 19, 0)
local SCRAP_MACHINE_POSITION = Vector3.new(21, 20, -5)

local SelectedFuelItems = {}
local SelectedScrapItems = {}
local SelectedFoodToCook = {}

local FoodList = { "Morsel", "Steak", "Ribs", "Salmon", "Mackerel" }
local FoodCookStates = {}

local AutoCookEnabled = false
local AutoUpgradeCampfireEnabled = false
local AutoScrapEnabled = false

local function MoveItemToPosition(item, targetPosition)
    if not item or not item:IsDescendantOf(workspace) then
        return
    end
    
    if not (item:IsA("BasePart") or item:IsA("Model")) then
        return
    end
    
    local primaryPart
    if item:IsA("Model") then
        primaryPart = item.PrimaryPart or item:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart") or item:FindFirstChild("Handle")
    else
        primaryPart = item
    end
    
    if not primaryPart or not primaryPart:IsA("BasePart") then
        return
    end
    
    if item:IsA("Model") and not item.PrimaryPart then
        pcall(function()
            item.PrimaryPart = primaryPart
        end)
    end
    
    pcall(function()
        ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.RequestStartDraggingItem:FireServer(item)
        if item:IsA("Model") then
            item:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(targetPosition))
        else
            primaryPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPosition)
        end
        ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.StopDraggingItem:FireServer(item)
    end)
end

AutoTab:Section({ Title = "Auto Upgrade Campfire", Icon = "flame" })

AutoTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Fuel",
    Desc = "Choose fuel items for campfire",
    Values = { "Log", "Coal", "Chair", "Fuel Canister", "Oil Barrel", "Biofuel" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedFuelItems = selected
    end
})

AutoTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Auto Upgrade Campfire",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoUpgradeCampfireEnabled = enabled
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(function()
                while AutoUpgradeCampfireEnabled do
                    for _, fuelName in ipairs(SelectedFuelItems) do
                        local itemsFolder = workspace:WaitForChild("Items")
                        local foundItems = {}
                        
                        for _, item in ipairs(itemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                            if item.Name == fuelName then
                                table.insert(foundItems, item)
                            end
                        end
                        
                        for i = 1, math.min(10, #foundItems) do
                            MoveItemToPosition(foundItems[i], CAMPFIRE_POSITION)
                        end
                    end
                    task.wait(1)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

AutoTab:Section({ Title = "Auto Scrap Items", Icon = "cog" })

AutoTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Scrap Items",
    Desc = "Choose items to scrap",
    Values = {
        "Log", "Chair", "Tyre", "Bolt", "Broken Fan", "Broken Microwave",
        "Sheet Metal", "Old Radio", "Washing Machine", "Old Car Engine",
        "Cultist Gem", "Gem of the Forest Fragment"
    },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedScrapItems = selected
    end
})

AutoTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Auto Scrap Items",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoScrapEnabled = enabled
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(function()
                while AutoScrapEnabled do
                    for _, itemName in ipairs(SelectedScrapItems) do
                        local itemsFolder = workspace:WaitForChild("Items")
                        local foundItems = {}
                        
                        for _, item in ipairs(itemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
                            if item.Name == itemName then
                                table.insert(foundItems, item)
                            end
                        end
                        
                        for i = 1, math.min(10, #foundItems) do
                            MoveItemToPosition(foundItems[i], SCRAP_MACHINE_POSITION)
                        end
                    end
                    task.wait(1)
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

AutoTab:Section({ Title = "Auto Cook Food", Icon = "flame" })

AutoTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Food to Cook",
    Desc = "Choose food items to auto cook",
    Values = FoodList,
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        for _, foodName in ipairs(FoodList) do
            FoodCookStates[foodName] = table.find(selected, foodName) ~= nil
        end
    end
})

AutoTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Auto Cook Food",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoCookEnabled = enabled
    end
})

coroutine.wrap(function()
    while true do
        if AutoCookEnabled then
            for foodName, shouldCook in pairs(FoodCookStates) do
                if shouldCook then
                    for _, item in ipairs(Workspace:WaitForChild("Items"):GetChildren()) do
                        if item.Name == foodName then
                            MoveItemToPosition(item, CAMPFIRE_POSITION)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        task.wait(0.5)
    end
end)()

local SaplingSearchTerm = "sapling"
local PlantCount = 75
local PlantSpacing = 44
local ShowPlantMarkers = true
local PlantDelay = 0.06
local MarkerLifetime = 6
local PlantOrigin = CFrame.new(-1.29994965, 1.99994278, -1.50001144, -0.249999881, 0.432982802, 0.866040468, 0.865997314, 0.500048637, -0.000015437603, -0.43306911, 0.74998486, -0.499974132)
local PlantPattern = "Circle"

local PlantRemote = (function()
    local remoteEvents = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("RemoteEvents")
    return remoteEvents and remoteEvents:FindFirstChild("RequestPlantItem") or nil
end)()

local function FindSapling()
    local itemsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Items")
    if itemsFolder then
        for _, item in ipairs(itemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
            if item.Name:lower():find(SaplingSearchTerm:lower()) then
                return item
            end
        end
    end
    
    for _, descendant in ipairs(ReplicatedStorage:GetDescendants()) do
        if (descendant:IsA("Model") or descendant:IsA("Tool")) and descendant.Name:lower():find(SaplingSearchTerm:lower()) then
            return descendant
        end
    end
    
    local searchLocations = {
        LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Backpack"),
        LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Inventory")
    }
    
    for _, location in ipairs(searchLocations) do
        if location then
            for _, item in ipairs(location:GetChildren()) do
                if item.Name:lower():find(SaplingSearchTerm:lower()) then
                    return item
                end
            end
        end
    end
    
    return nil
end

local function GetGroundHeight(position, fallbackY)
    local rayOrigin = Vector3.new(position.X, (fallbackY or position.Y) + 50, position.Z)
    local rayDirection = Vector3.new(0, -200, 0)
    
    local rayParams = RaycastParams.new()
    rayParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = { LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer }
    rayParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Blacklist
    
    local rayResult = workspace:Raycast(rayOrigin, rayDirection, rayParams)
    return rayResult and rayResult.Position and rayResult.Position.Y or (fallbackY or position.Y)
end

local function CreatePlantMarker(position)
    if ShowPlantMarkers then
        local marker = Instance.new("Part")
        marker.Size = Vector3.new(1, 1, 1)
        marker.Anchored = true
        marker.CanCollide = false
        marker.Transparency = 0.45
        marker.Color = Color3.fromRGB(45, 200, 45)
        marker.Name = "SaplingMarker"
        marker.CFrame = CFrame.new(position + Vector3.new(0, 0.5, 0))
        marker.Parent = workspace
        Debris:AddItem(marker, MarkerLifetime)
    end
end

local function FireRemote(remote, args)
    if not remote then
        return false
    end
    
    local success = false
    
    if remote.ClassName == "RemoteFunction" or remote.InvokeServer then
        success = pcall(function()
            remote:InvokeServer(table.unpack(args or {}))
        end)
    elseif remote.ClassName == "RemoteEvent" or remote.FireServer then
        success = pcall(function()
            remote:FireServer(table.unpack(args or {}))
        end)
    end
    
    return success
end

local function TryPlantSapling(remote, sapling, position)
    if not remote then
        return false
    end
    
    local argCombinations = {
        { sapling, position },
        { position, sapling },
        { tostring(sapling), position },
        { position, tostring(sapling) }
    }
    
    for _, args in ipairs(argCombinations) do
        if FireRemote(remote, args) then
            return true
        end
        task.wait(0.03)
    end
    
    return false
end

local function PlantCirclePattern(center, count, radius)
    local sapling = FindSapling() or SaplingSearchTerm
    
    for i = 1, math.max(1, count) do
        local angle = 2 * math.pi / count * (i - 1)
        local x = center.X + math.cos(angle) * radius
        local z = center.Z + math.sin(angle) * radius
        local y = GetGroundHeight(Vector3.new(x, center.Y, z), center.Y)
        local plantPosition = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
        
        CreatePlantMarker(plantPosition)
        TryPlantSapling(PlantRemote, sapling, plantPosition)
        task.wait(PlantDelay)
    end
end

local function PlantSquarePattern(center, count, spacing)
    local gridSize = math.max(1, math.floor(math.sqrt(count)))
    local offset = (gridSize - 1) / 2
    local sapling = FindSapling() or SaplingSearchTerm
    local planted = 0
    
    for row = 0, gridSize - 1 do
        for col = 0, gridSize - 1 do
            if planted >= count then
                break
            end
            
            local x = center.X + (row - offset) * spacing
            local z = center.Z + (col - offset) * spacing
            local y = GetGroundHeight(Vector3.new(x, center.Y, z), center.Y)
            local plantPosition = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
            
            CreatePlantMarker(plantPosition)
            TryPlantSapling(PlantRemote, sapling, plantPosition)
            planted = planted + 1
            task.wait(PlantDelay)
        end
    end
end

local function PlantSpiralPattern(center, count, spacing)
    local sapling = FindSapling() or SaplingSearchTerm
    local angleStep = math.pi / 4
    local radiusStep = spacing / (2 * math.pi)
    local currentAngle = 0
    local currentRadius = 0
    
    for _ = 1, math.max(1, count) do
        local x = center.X + currentRadius * math.cos(currentAngle)
        local z = center.Z + currentRadius * math.sin(currentAngle)
        local y = GetGroundHeight(Vector3.new(x, center.Y, z), center.Y)
        local plantPosition = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
        
        CreatePlantMarker(plantPosition)
        TryPlantSapling(PlantRemote, sapling, plantPosition)
        
        currentAngle = currentAngle + angleStep
        currentRadius = currentRadius + radiusStep
        task.wait(PlantDelay)
    end
end

local function PlantLinePattern(center, count, spacing)
    local sapling = FindSapling() or SaplingSearchTerm
    
    for i = 0, count - 1 do
        local x = center.X + i * spacing
        local z = center.Z
        local y = GetGroundHeight(Vector3.new(x, center.Y, z), center.Y)
        local plantPosition = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
        
        CreatePlantMarker(plantPosition)
        TryPlantSapling(PlantRemote, sapling, plantPosition)
        task.wait(PlantDelay)
    end
end

local function PlantStarPattern(center, count, spacing)
    local sapling = FindSapling() or SaplingSearchTerm
    local points = 5
    local angleStep = math.pi / points
    local planted = 0
    
    for i = 0, 2 * points - 1 do
        if planted >= count then
            break
        end
        
        local radius = (i % 2 == 0) and spacing or (spacing / 2)
        local x = center.X + radius * math.cos(i * angleStep)
        local z = center.Z + radius * math.sin(i * angleStep)
        local y = GetGroundHeight(Vector3.new(x, center.Y, z), center.Y)
        local plantPosition = Vector3.new(x, y, z)
        
        CreatePlantMarker(plantPosition)
        TryPlantSapling(PlantRemote, sapling, plantPosition)
        planted = planted + 1
        task.wait(PlantDelay)
    end
end

local function ExecutePlantPattern(pattern)
    local center = PlantOrigin.Position
    
    if pattern == "Circle" then
        PlantCirclePattern(center, PlantCount, PlantSpacing)
    elseif pattern == "Square" then
        PlantSquarePattern(center, PlantCount, PlantSpacing)
    elseif pattern == "Spiral" then
        PlantSpiralPattern(center, PlantCount, PlantSpacing)
    elseif pattern == "Line" then
        PlantLinePattern(center, PlantCount, PlantSpacing)
    elseif pattern == "Star" then
        PlantStarPattern(center, PlantCount, PlantSpacing)
    end
end

local AutoPlantEnabled = false

local function AutoPlantLoop()
    while AutoPlantEnabled do
        ExecutePlantPattern(PlantPattern)
        task.wait(0.5)
    end
end

AutoTab:Section({ Title = "Auto Plant", Icon = "tree-deciduous" })

AutoTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Plant Pattern",
    Desc = "Choose planting pattern",
    Values = { "Circle", "Square", "Spiral", "Line", "Star" },
    Multi = false,
    Value = PlantPattern,
    Callback = function(selected)
        PlantPattern = selected
    end
})

AutoTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Auto Plant",
    Value = AutoPlantEnabled,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        AutoPlantEnabled = enabled
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(AutoPlantLoop)
        end
    end
})

local ItemList = {
    "Bandage", "Bolt", "Broken Fan", "Broken Microwave", "Cake", "Carrot",
    "Chair", "Coal", "Coin Stack", "Cooked Morsel", "Cooked Steak",
    "Fuel Canister", "Iron Body", "Leather Armor", "Log", "MadKit",
    "Metal Chair", "MedKit", "Old Car Engine", "Old Flashlight", "Old Radio",
    "Revolver", "Revolver Ammo", "Rifle", "Rifle Ammo", "Morsel",
    "Sheet Metal", "Steak", "Tyre", "Washing Machine", "Cultist Gem",
    "Gem of the Forest Fragment"
}

local EntityList = {
    "Bunny", "Wolf", "Alpha Wolf", "Bear", "Crossbow Cultist", "Alien",
    "Alien Elite", "Polar Bear", "Arctic Fox", "Mammoth", "Cultist",
    "Cultist Melee", "Cultist Crossbow", "Cultist Juggernaut"
}

local ItemESPStates = {}
local EntityESPStates = {}

for _, item in pairs(ItemList) do
    ItemESPStates[item] = false
end

for _, entity in pairs(EntityList) do
    EntityESPStates[entity] = false
end

local function CreateESPBillboard(part, text, color)
    if not part or not part:IsA("BasePart") then
        return nil
    end
    
    local billboard = Instance.new("BillboardGui")
    billboard.Name = "ProjectYoda_ESP"
    billboard.Adornee = part
    billboard.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 50)
    billboard.AlwaysOnTop = true
    billboard.StudsOffset = Vector3.new(0, 2.5, 0)
    billboard.MaxDistance = 300
    
    local label = Instance.new("TextLabel", billboard)
    label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, 0)
    label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    label.TextStrokeColor3 = Color3.new(0, 0, 0)
    label.TextStrokeTransparency = 0.5
    label.Text = text
    label.TextScaled = true
    label.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
    
    billboard.Parent = part
    return billboard
end

local function UpdateItemESP(enabled, itemName)
    local itemsFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Items")
    if not itemsFolder then
        return
    end
    
    for _, item in pairs(itemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
        if item.Name == itemName then
            local targetPart = nil
            
            if item:IsA("Model") then
                targetPart = item.PrimaryPart or item:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
            elseif item:IsA("BasePart") then
                targetPart = item
            end
            
            if targetPart then
                local existingESP = targetPart:FindFirstChild("ProjectYoda_ESP")
                
                if enabled and not existingESP then
                    CreateESPBillboard(targetPart, itemName, Color3.fromRGB(0, 255, 0))
                elseif not enabled and existingESP then
                    existingESP:Destroy()
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

local function UpdateEntityESP(enabled, entityName)
    local charactersFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Characters")
    if not charactersFolder then
        return
    end
    
    for _, entity in pairs(charactersFolder:GetChildren()) do
        if entity:IsA("Model") and entity.Name == entityName then
            local targetPart = entity:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") or entity.PrimaryPart or entity:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
            
            if targetPart then
                local existingESP = targetPart:FindFirstChild("ProjectYoda_ESP")
                
                if enabled and not existingESP then
                    CreateESPBillboard(targetPart, entityName, Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 0))
                elseif not enabled and existingESP then
                    existingESP:Destroy()
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

ESPTab:Section({ Title = "Item ESP", Icon = "box" })

for _, itemName in pairs(ItemList) do
    ESPTab:Toggle({
        Title = itemName,
        Value = false,
        Callback = function(enabled)
            ItemESPStates[itemName] = enabled
            UpdateItemESP(enabled, itemName)
        end
    })
end

ESPTab:Section({ Title = "Entity ESP", Icon = "users" })

for _, entityName in pairs(EntityList) do
    ESPTab:Toggle({
        Title = entityName,
        Value = false,
        Callback = function(enabled)
            EntityESPStates[entityName] = enabled
            UpdateEntityESP(enabled, entityName)
        end
    })
end

local itemsFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Items")
if itemsFolder then
    itemsFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(newItem)
        task.wait(0.1)
        for itemName, enabled in pairs(ItemESPStates) do
            if enabled and newItem.Name == itemName then
                UpdateItemESP(true, itemName)
            end
        end
    end)
end

local charactersFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Characters")
if charactersFolder then
    charactersFolder.ChildAdded:Connect(function(newEntity)
        task.wait(0.1)
        for entityName, enabled in pairs(EntityESPStates) do
            if enabled and newEntity.Name == entityName then
                UpdateEntityESP(true, entityName)
            end
        end
    end)
end

local SelectedJunkItems = {}
local SelectedBringFuelItems = {}
local SelectedBringFoodItems = {}
local SelectedMedicalItems = {}
local SelectedEquipmentItems = {}
local SelectedPelts = {}
local SelectedBlueprints = {}

local function BringItemsToPlayer(itemNames)
    local character = LocalPlayer.Character
    if not character then
        return
    end
    
    local rootPart = character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    if not rootPart then
        return
    end
    
    local targetPosition = rootPart.Position + Vector3.new(2, 0, 0)
    
    for _, itemName in ipairs(itemNames) do
        for _, object in ipairs(workspace:GetDescendants()) do
            if object.Name == itemName and (object:IsA("BasePart") or object:IsA("Model")) then
                local primaryPart = nil
                
                if object:IsA("Model") then
                    primaryPart = object.PrimaryPart or object:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart") or object:FindFirstChild("Handle")
                elseif object:IsA("BasePart") then
                    primaryPart = object
                end
                
                if primaryPart then
                    if object:IsA("Model") and not object.PrimaryPart then
                        pcall(function()
                            object.PrimaryPart = primaryPart
                        end)
                    end
                    
                    pcall(function()
                        ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.RequestStartDraggingItem:FireServer(object)
                        if object:IsA("Model") then
                            object:SetPrimaryPartCFrame(CFrame.new(targetPosition))
                        else
                            primaryPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(targetPosition)
                        end
                        ReplicatedStorage.RemoteEvents.StopDraggingItem:FireServer(object)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

BringTab:Section({ Title = "Junk Items", Icon = "box" })

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Junk Items",
    Desc = "Choose items to bring",
    Values = { "Tyre", "Bolt", "Broken Fan", "Broken Microwave", "Sheet Metal", "Old Radio", "Washing Machine", "Old Car Engine" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedJunkItems = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Junk Items",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedJunkItems)
    end
})

    Title = "Select Fuel Items",

    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedBringFuelItems = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Fuel Items",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedBringFuelItems)
    end
})

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Food Items",
    Desc = "Choose items to bring",
    Values = { "Cake", "Cooked Steak", "Cooked Morsel", "Steak", "Morsel", "Berry", "Carrot" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedBringFoodItems = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Food Items",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedBringFoodItems)
    end
})

BringTab:Section({ Title = "Medical Items", Icon = "bandage" })

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Medical Items",
    Desc = "Choose items to bring",
    Values = { "Bandage", "MedKit" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedMedicalItems = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Medical Items",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedMedicalItems)
    end
})

BringTab:Section({ Title = "Equipment Items", Icon = "sword" })

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Equipment Items",
    Desc = "Choose items to bring",
    Values = { "Revolver", "Rifle", "Leather Body", "Iron Body", "Revolver Ammo", "Rifle Ammo", "Giant Sack", "Good Sack", "Strong Axe", "Good Axe" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedEquipmentItems = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Equipment Items",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedEquipmentItems)
    end
})

BringTab:Section({ Title = "Pelts", Icon = "paw" })

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Pelts to Bring",
    Desc = "Choose pelts to bring",
    Values = { "Bunny Foot", "Wolf Pelt", "Alpha Wolf Pelt", "Bear Pelt", "Arctic Fox Pelt", "Polar Bear Pelt" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedPelts = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Pelts",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedPelts)
    end
})

BringTab:Section({ Title = "Blueprints", Icon = "clipboard" })

BringTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Blueprints to Bring",
    Desc = "Choose blueprints to bring",
    Values = { "Crafting Blueprint", "Defense Blueprint", "Furniture Blueprint" },
    Multi = true,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedBlueprints = selected
    end
})

BringTab:Button({
    Title = "Bring Blueprints",
    Callback = function()
        BringItemsToPlayer(SelectedBlueprints)
    end
})

local ScanMapEnabled = false

TeleportTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Scan Map (Essential)",
    Default = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ScanMapEnabled = enabled
        
        local character = (LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait())
        local rootPart = character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart", 3)
        
        if not rootPart then
            return
        end
        
        local mapFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
        if not mapFolder then
            return
        end
        
        local foliageFolder = mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Foliage") or mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Landmarks")
        if not foliageFolder then
            return
        end
        
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(function()
                while ScanMapEnabled do
                    local trees = {}
                    
                    for _, child in ipairs(foliageFolder:GetChildren()) do
                        if child.Name == "Small Tree" and child:IsA("Model") then
                            local trunk = child:FindFirstChild("Trunk") or child.PrimaryPart
                            if trunk then
                                table.insert(trees, trunk)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    for _, trunk in ipairs(trees) do
                        if not ScanMapEnabled then
                            break
                        end
                        
                        if trunk and trunk.Parent then
                            local trunkCFrame = trunk.CFrame
                            local rightVector = trunkCFrame.RightVector
                            local teleportPosition = trunkCFrame.Position + rightVector * 69
                            rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(teleportPosition)
                            task.wait(0.01)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Section({ Title = "Teleport", Icon = "map" })

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Campfire",
    Callback = function()
        local character = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
        character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(0.43, 15.77, -1.88, -0.27, 0.1, 0.95, 0.63, 0.76, 0.09, -0.71, 0.63, -0.27)
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Stronghold",
    Callback = function()
        local doorModel = workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
            and workspace.Map:FindFirstChild("Landmarks")
            and workspace.Map.Landmarks:FindFirstChild("Stronghold")
            and workspace.Map.Landmarks.Stronghold:FindFirstChild("Functional")
            and workspace.Map.Landmarks.Stronghold.Functional:FindFirstChild("EntryDoors")
            and workspace.Map.Landmarks.Stronghold.Functional.EntryDoors:FindFirstChild("DoorRight")
        
        if doorModel then
            doorModel = doorModel:FindFirstChild("Model")
        end
        
        if doorModel then
            local character = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
            character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = doorModel.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Safe Zone",
    Callback = function()
        if not workspace:FindFirstChild("SafeZonePart") then
            local safeZone = Instance.new("Part")
            safeZone.Name = "SafeZonePart"
            safeZone.Size = Vector3.new(50, 50, 50)
            safeZone.Position = Vector3.new(0, 105, 0)
            safeZone.Anchored = true
            safeZone.CanCollide = false
            safeZone.Transparency = 0.8
            safeZone.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
            safeZone.Parent = workspace
        end
        
        local character = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
        character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(0, 110, 0)
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Trader (Bunny Foot)",
    Callback = function()
        local traderPosition = Vector3.new(-37.08, 3.98, -16.33)
        local character = LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()
        character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart").CFrame = CFrame.new(traderPosition)
    end
})

TeleportTab:Section({ Title = "Tree", Icon = "tree-deciduous" })

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Random Tree",
    Callback = function()
        local rootPart = (LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()):FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart", 3)
        if not rootPart then
            return
        end
        
        local mapFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
        if not mapFolder then
            return
        end
        
        local foliageFolder = mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Foliage") or mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Landmarks")
        if not foliageFolder then
            return
        end
        
        local trees = {}
        for _, child in ipairs(foliageFolder:GetChildren()) do
            if child.Name == "Small Tree" and child:IsA("Model") then
                local trunk = child:FindFirstChild("Trunk") or child.PrimaryPart
                if trunk then
                    table.insert(trees, trunk)
                end
            end
        end
        
        if #trees > 0 then
            local randomTree = trees[math.random(1, #trees)]
            local treeCFrame = randomTree.CFrame
            local rightVector = treeCFrame.RightVector
            local teleportPosition = treeCFrame.Position + rightVector * 3
            rootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(teleportPosition)
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Section({ Title = "Children", Icon = "eye" })

local ChildrenList = {}
local ChildrenNames = {}
local SelectedChild = nil

local function RefreshChildrenList()
    ChildrenNames = {}
    ChildrenList = {}
    
    local charactersFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Characters")
    if charactersFolder then
        for _, entity in pairs(charactersFolder:GetChildren()) do
            if entity.Name:match("^Lost Child") and entity:GetAttribute("Lost") == true then
                table.insert(ChildrenList, entity)
                table.insert(ChildrenNames, entity.Name)
            end
        end
    end
end

RefreshChildrenList()

local ChildDropdown = TeleportTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Child",
    Values = ChildrenNames,
    Multi = false,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedChild = selected
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Refresh List",
    Callback = function()
        RefreshChildrenList()
        if #ChildrenNames <= 0 then
            SelectedChild = nil
            ChildDropdown:Refresh({ "No child found" })
        else
            SelectedChild = ChildrenNames[1]
            ChildDropdown:Refresh(ChildrenNames)
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Child",
    Callback = function()
        if SelectedChild and ChildrenList then
            for index, name in ipairs(ChildrenNames) do
                if name == SelectedChild then
                    local child = ChildrenList[index]
                    if child then
                        local targetPart = child.PrimaryPart or child:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        local rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if targetPart and rootPart then
                            rootPart.CFrame = targetPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
                        end
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Section({ Title = "Chest", Icon = "box" })

local ChestList = {}
local ChestNames = {}
local SelectedChest = nil

local function RefreshChestList()
    ChestNames = {}
    ChestList = {}
    
    local itemsFolder = workspace:FindFirstChild("Items")
    if itemsFolder then
        for _, item in pairs(itemsFolder:GetChildren()) do
            if item.Name:match("^Item Chest") and not item:GetAttribute("8721081708Opened") then
                table.insert(ChestList, item)
                table.insert(ChestNames, "Chest " .. #ChestNames + 1)
            end
        end
    end
end

RefreshChestList()

local ChestDropdown = TeleportTab:Dropdown({
    Title = "Select Chest",
    Values = ChestNames,
    Multi = false,
    AllowNone = true,
    Callback = function(selected)
        SelectedChest = selected
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Refresh List",
    Callback = function()
        RefreshChestList()
        if #ChestNames <= 0 then
            SelectedChest = nil
            ChestDropdown:Refresh({ "No chests found" })
        else
            SelectedChest = ChestNames[1]
            ChestDropdown:Refresh(ChestNames)
        end
    end
})

TeleportTab:Button({
    Title = "Teleport to Chest",
    Callback = function()
        if SelectedChest and ChestList then
            for index, name in ipairs(ChestNames) do
                if name == SelectedChest then
                    local chest = ChestList[index]
                    if chest then
                        local targetPart = chest.PrimaryPart or chest:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        local rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        
                        if targetPart and rootPart then
                            rootPart.CFrame = targetPart.CFrame + Vector3.new(0, 5, 0)
                        end
                    end
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
})

local FlyEnabled = false
local FlySpeed = 1
local IsFlying = false
local InputBeganConnection = nil
local InputEndedConnection = nil
local CharacterAddedConnection = nil
local RenderSteppedConnection = nil

local function StartFlyPC()
    repeat task.wait() until LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart") and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    repeat task.wait() until UserInputService
    
    if InputBeganConnection or InputEndedConnection then
        InputBeganConnection:Disconnect()
        InputEndedConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    
    local rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local movementKeys = { F = 0, B = 0, L = 0, R = 0, Q = 0, E = 0 }
    local lastMovement = { F = 0, B = 0, L = 0, R = 0 }
    local currentSpeed = FlySpeed
    
    local function InitializeFly()
        IsFlying = true
        
        local bodyGyro = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
        local bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
        
        bodyGyro.P = 90000
        bodyGyro.Parent = rootPart
        bodyGyro.MaxTorque = Vector3.new(9e9, 9e9, 9e9)
        bodyGyro.CFrame = rootPart.CFrame
        
        bodyVelocity.Parent = rootPart
        bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
        bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(9e9, 9e9, 9e9)
        
        task.spawn(function()
            while IsFlying do
                task.wait()
                
                if not FlyEnabled and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                    LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid").PlatformStand = true
                end
                
                if movementKeys.L + movementKeys.R ~= 0 or movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B ~= 0 or movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E ~= 0 then
                    currentSpeed = FlySpeed
                elseif movementKeys.L + movementKeys.R == 0 and movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B == 0 and movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E == 0 and currentSpeed ~= 0 then
                    currentSpeed = 0
                end
                
                local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
                
                if movementKeys.L + movementKeys.R ~= 0 or movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B ~= 0 or movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E ~= 0 then
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = (camera.CoordinateFrame.lookVector * (movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B) + (camera.CoordinateFrame * CFrame.new(movementKeys.L + movementKeys.R, (movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B + movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E) * 0.2, 0).p - camera.CoordinateFrame.p)) * currentSpeed
                    lastMovement = { F = movementKeys.F, B = movementKeys.B, L = movementKeys.L, R = movementKeys.R }
                elseif movementKeys.L + movementKeys.R ~= 0 or movementKeys.F + movementKeys.B ~= 0 or movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E ~= 0 or currentSpeed == 0 then
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
                else
                    bodyVelocity.Velocity = (camera.CoordinateFrame.lookVector * (lastMovement.F + lastMovement.B) + (camera.CoordinateFrame * CFrame.new(lastMovement.L + lastMovement.R, (lastMovement.F + lastMovement.B + movementKeys.Q + movementKeys.E) * 0.2, 0).p - camera.CoordinateFrame.p)) * currentSpeed
                end
                
                bodyGyro.CFrame = camera.CoordinateFrame
            end
            
            movementKeys = { F = 0, B = 0, L = 0, R = 0, Q = 0, E = 0 }
            lastMovement = { F = 0, B = 0, L = 0, R = 0 }
            currentSpeed = 0
            
            bodyGyro:Destroy()
            bodyVelocity:Destroy()
            
            if LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid").PlatformStand = false
            end
        end)
    end
    
    InputBeganConnection = UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
            local keyName = input.KeyCode.Name
            
            if keyName == "W" then
                movementKeys.F = FlySpeed
            elseif keyName == "S" then
                movementKeys.B = -FlySpeed
            elseif keyName == "A" then
                movementKeys.L = -FlySpeed
            elseif keyName == "D" then
                movementKeys.R = FlySpeed
            elseif keyName == "E" then
                movementKeys.Q = FlySpeed * 2
            elseif keyName == "Q" then
                movementKeys.E = -FlySpeed * 2
            end
            
            pcall(function()
                workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Track
            end)
        end
    end)
    
    InputEndedConnection = UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.Keyboard then
            local keyName = input.KeyCode.Name
            
            if keyName == "W" then
                movementKeys.F = 0
            elseif keyName == "S" then
                movementKeys.B = 0
            elseif keyName == "A" then
                movementKeys.L = 0
            elseif keyName == "D" then
                movementKeys.R = 0
            elseif keyName == "E" then
                movementKeys.Q = 0
            elseif keyName == "Q" then
                movementKeys.E = 0
            end
        end
    end)
    
    InitializeFly()
end

local function StopFly()
    IsFlying = false
    
    if InputBeganConnection then
        InputBeganConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    if InputEndedConnection then
        InputEndedConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    if CharacterAddedConnection then
        CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    if RenderSteppedConnection then
        RenderSteppedConnection:Disconnect()
    end
    
    if LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
        LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid").PlatformStand = false
    end
    
    pcall(function()
        workspace.CurrentCamera.CameraType = Enum.CameraType.Custom
    end)
end

local function CleanupFly()
    pcall(function()
        IsFlying = false
        local rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        if rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity") then
            rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity"):Destroy()
        end
        if rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyGyro") then
            rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyGyro"):Destroy()
        end
        
        if LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid") then
            LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid").PlatformStand = false
        end
        
        if CharacterAddedConnection then
            CharacterAddedConnection:Disconnect()
        end
        if RenderSteppedConnection then
            RenderSteppedConnection:Disconnect()
        end
    end)
end

local function StartFlyMobile()
    CleanupFly()
    IsFlying = true
    
    local rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
    local camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
    local zeroVector = Vector3.new()
    local maxForce = Vector3.new(9e9, 9e9, 9e9)
    local ControlModule = require(LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts:WaitForChild("PlayerModule"):WaitForChild("ControlModule"))
    
    local bodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
    bodyVelocity.Name = "BodyVelocity"
    bodyVelocity.Parent = rootPart
    bodyVelocity.MaxForce = zeroVector
    bodyVelocity.Velocity = zeroVector
    
    local bodyGyro = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
    bodyGyro.Name = "BodyGyro"
    bodyGyro.Parent = rootPart
    bodyGyro.MaxTorque = maxForce
    bodyGyro.P = 1000
    bodyGyro.D = 50
    
    CharacterAddedConnection = LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function()
        local newRootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        local newBodyVelocity = Instance.new("BodyVelocity")
        newBodyVelocity.Name = "BodyVelocity"
        newBodyVelocity.Parent = newRootPart
        newBodyVelocity.MaxForce = zeroVector
        newBodyVelocity.Velocity = zeroVector
        
        local newBodyGyro = Instance.new("BodyGyro")
        newBodyGyro.Name = "BodyGyro"
        newBodyGyro.Parent = newRootPart
        newBodyGyro.MaxTorque = maxForce
        newBodyGyro.P = 1000
        newBodyGyro.D = 50
    end)
    
    RenderSteppedConnection = RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function()
        rootPart = LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        camera = workspace.CurrentCamera
        
        local humanoid = LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("Humanoid")
        local bv = rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
        local bg = rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyGyro")
        
        if humanoid and rootPart and bv and bg then
            bv.MaxForce = maxForce
            bg.MaxTorque = maxForce
            humanoid.PlatformStand = true
            bg.CFrame = camera.CoordinateFrame
            bv.Velocity = zeroVector
            
            local moveVector = ControlModule:GetMoveVector()
            
            if moveVector.X > 0 then
                bv.Velocity = bv.Velocity + camera.CFrame.RightVector * (moveVector.X * (FlySpeed * 50))
            end
            if moveVector.X < 0 then
                bv.Velocity = bv.Velocity + camera.CFrame.RightVector * (moveVector.X * (FlySpeed * 50))
            end
            if moveVector.Z > 0 then
                bv.Velocity = bv.Velocity - camera.CFrame.LookVector * (moveVector.Z * (FlySpeed * 50))
            end
            if moveVector.Z < 0 then
                bv.Velocity = bv.Velocity - camera.CFrame.LookVector * (moveVector.Z * (FlySpeed * 50))
            end
        end
    end)
end

PlayerTab:Section({ Title = "Main", Icon = "eye" })

PlayerTab:Slider({
    Title = "Fly Speed",
    Value = { Min = 1, Max = 20, Default = 1 },
    Callback = function(value)
        FlySpeed = value
        
        if IsFlying then
            task.spawn(function()
                while IsFlying do
                    task.wait(0.1)
                    
                    if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
                        local character = LocalPlayer.Character
                        local rootPart = character and character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                        local bv = rootPart and rootPart:FindFirstChild("BodyVelocity")
                        
                        if bv then
                            bv.Velocity = bv.Velocity.Unit * (FlySpeed * 50)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})

PlayerTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Enable Fly",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        FlyEnabled = enabled
        
        if FlyEnabled then
            if UserInputService.TouchEnabled then
                StartFlyMobile()
            else
                StartFlyPC()
            end
        else
            StopFly()
            CleanupFly()
        end
    end
})

local SpeedValue = 16
local JumpValue = 50

local function SetWalkSpeed(speed)
    local humanoid = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        humanoid.WalkSpeed = speed
    end
end

local function SetJumpPower(power)
    local humanoid = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if humanoid then
        humanoid.JumpPower = power
    end
end

PlayerTab:Slider({
    Title = "Speed",
    Value = { Min = 16, Max = 300, Default = 16 },
    Callback = function(value)
        SpeedValue = value
    end
})

PlayerTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Enable Speed",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        SetWalkSpeed(enabled and SpeedValue or 16)
    end
})

PlayerTab:Slider({
    Title = "Jump",
    Value = { Min = 10, Max = 300, Default = 50 },
    Callback = function(value)
        JumpValue = value
    end
})

PlayerTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Enable Jump",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        SetJumpPower(enabled and JumpValue or 50)
    end
})

local NoClipConnection = nil

PlayerTab:Toggle({
    Title = "No Clip",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        if enabled then
            NoClipConnection = RunService.Stepped:Connect(function()
                local character = LocalPlayer.Character
                if character then
                    for _, part in ipairs(character:GetDescendants()) do
                        if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                            part.CanCollide = false
                        end
                    end
                end
            end)
        elseif NoClipConnection then
            NoClipConnection:Disconnect()
            NoClipConnection = nil
        end
    end
})

local InfiniteJumpConnection = nil

PlayerTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Infinite Jump",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        if enabled then
            InfiniteJumpConnection = UserInputService.JumpRequest:Connect(function()
                local humanoid = LocalPlayer.Character and LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid then
                    humanoid:ChangeState(Enum.HumanoidStateType.Jumping)
                end
            end)
        elseif InfiniteJumpConnection then
            InfiniteJumpConnection:Disconnect()
            InfiniteJumpConnection = nil
        end
    end
})

local KillAuraEnabled = false
local ChopAuraEnabled = false
local AuraRadius = 50
local ChopCounter = 0
local GodmodeEnabled = false

local ToolIDs = {
    ["Old Axe"] = "3_7367831688",
    ["Good Axe"] = "112_7367831688",
    ["Strong Axe"] = "116_7367831688",
    ["Chainsaw"] = "647_8992824875",
    ["Spear"] = "196_8999010016"
}

local function FindEquippedTool(axeOnly)
    for toolName, toolId in pairs(ToolIDs) do
        if not axeOnly or toolName == "Old Axe" or toolName == "Good Axe" or toolName == "Strong Axe" or toolName == "Chainsaw" then
            local inventory = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChild("Inventory")
            local tool = inventory and inventory:FindFirstChild(toolName)
            
            if tool then
                return tool, toolId
            end
        end
    end
    return nil, nil
end

local function EquipTool(tool)
    if tool then
        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents").EquipItemHandle:FireServer("FireAllClients", tool)
    end
end

local function UnequipTool(tool)
    if tool then
        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents").UnequipItemHandle:FireServer("FireAllClients", tool)
    end
end

local function KillAuraLoop()
    while KillAuraEnabled do
        local rootPart = (LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()):FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        if rootPart then
            local tool, toolId = FindEquippedTool(false)
            
            if tool and toolId then
                EquipTool(tool)
                
                for _, entity in ipairs(Workspace.Characters:GetChildren()) do
                    if entity:IsA("Model") then
                        local entityPart = entity:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart")
                        
                        if entityPart and (entityPart.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude <= AuraRadius then
                            pcall(function()
                                ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents").ToolDamageObject:InvokeServer(entity, tool, toolId, CFrame.new(entityPart.Position))
                            end)
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.1)
            else
                task.wait(1)
            end
        else
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end
end

local function ChopAuraLoop()
    while ChopAuraEnabled do
        local rootPart = (LocalPlayer.Character or LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Wait()):FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        
        if rootPart then
            local tool, toolId = FindEquippedTool(true)
            
            if tool and toolId then
                EquipTool(tool)
                ChopCounter = ChopCounter + 1
                
                local trees = {}
                local mapFolder = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Map")
                
                if mapFolder then
                    if mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Foliage") then
                        for _, child in ipairs(mapFolder.Foliage:GetChildren()) do
                            if child:IsA("Model") and child.Name == "Small Tree" then
                                table.insert(trees, child)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    
                    if mapFolder:FindFirstChild("Landmarks") then
                        for _, child in ipairs(mapFolder.Landmarks:GetChildren()) do
                            if child:IsA("Model") and child.Name == "Small Tree" then
                                table.insert(trees, child)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                
                for _, tree in ipairs(trees) do
                    local trunk = tree:FindFirstChild("Trunk")
                    
                    if trunk and trunk:IsA("BasePart") and (trunk.Position - rootPart.Position).Magnitude <= AuraRadius then
                        local isChopping = false
                        
                        task.spawn(function()
                            while ChopAuraEnabled and tree and tree.Parent and not isChopping do
                                isChopping = true
                                ChopCounter = ChopCounter + 1
                                
                                pcall(function()
                                    ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents").ToolDamageObject:InvokeServer(
                                        tree,
                                        tool,
                                        tostring(ChopCounter) .. "_7367831688",
                                        CFrame.new(-2.962610244751, 4.5547881126404, -75.950843811035, 0.89621275663376, -1.3894891459643e-8, 0.44362446665764, -7.994568895775e-10, 1, 3.293635941759e-8, -0.44362446665764, -2.9872644802253e-8, 0.89621275663376)
                                    )
                                end)
                                
                                task.wait(0.5)
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
                
                task.wait(0.1)
            else
                task.wait(1)
            end
        else
            task.wait(0.5)
        end
    end
end

CombatTab:Section({ Title = "Aura", Icon = "star" })

CombatTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Kill Aura",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        KillAuraEnabled = enabled
        
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(KillAuraLoop)
        else
            local tool = FindEquippedTool(false)
            UnequipTool(tool)
        end
    end
})

CombatTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Chop Aura",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        ChopAuraEnabled = enabled
        
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(ChopAuraLoop)
        else
            local tool = FindEquippedTool(true)
            UnequipTool(tool)
        end
    end
})

CombatTab:Section({ Title = "Settings", Icon = "settings" })

CombatTab:Slider({
    Title = "Aura Radius",
    Value = { Min = 50, Max = 500, Default = 50 },
    Callback = function(value)
        AuraRadius = math.clamp(value, 10, 500)
    end
})

CombatTab:Section({ Title = "Godmode", Icon = "shield" })

CombatTab:Toggle({
    Title = "Godmode",
    Value = false,
    Callback = function(enabled)
        GodmodeEnabled = enabled
        
        if enabled then
            task.spawn(function()
                while GodmodeEnabled do
                    pcall(function()
                        ReplicatedStorage:WaitForChild("RemoteEvents"):WaitForChild("DamagePlayer"):FireServer(-(1 / 0))
                    end)
                    task.wait()
                end
            end)
        end
    end
})
